summary: Validate and approve supplier invoice for office equipment.
request: Validate and approve this supplier invoice from Société Numidia Distribution for office equipment, total 850,000 DZD TTC, paid in cash. The invoice has no NIF, no NIS, no RC, and no fiscal stamp.
